ksa_text: Knowledge of algorithmic fairness concepts, including group fairness metrics (demographic parity, equalized odds, calibration), individual fairness, intersectional fairness, and the mathematical trade-offs between competing fairness definitions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-007 (AG, Knowledge) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5604 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.560, nist_ai_rmf=0.559, nice=0.439. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5604 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-K-007 (AG, composite 0.5604) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.5604 with signal across eu_ai_act=0.560, nist_ai_rmf=0.559, nice=0.439 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5604, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
